Chicken Tikka Masala: Marinate 900g boneless chicken pieces in 1 cup yogurt mixed with 2 teaspoons each of cumin, garam masala, turmeric, and chili powder for at least 2 hours, then grill or broil until charred at the edges. For the sauce, sauté 1 large onion, 5 garlic cloves, and 1-inch fresh ginger in butter until golden; add 1 tablespoon tomato paste, 1 can crushed tomatoes, 1 cup heavy cream, and the remaining spices, simmering for 15 minutes. Add the cooked chicken to the sauce and simmer for an additional 10 minutes to meld flavors. Serve over basmati rice with warm naan and a garnish of fresh cilantro.
